revision.comment: Bot: mark 1 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23989927232|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:県犬養氏]][[ru:Агата-Инукаи]][[uk:Аґата-Інуакаї]] {{Infobox Japanese clan |Clan Name = Ken Inukai Clan |画像 = |Clan Surname = Ken Inukai {{ill|Sukune|en|Sukune|qid=Q11455653|lt=Sukune|1=Sukune}} |Progenitor = {{ill|Kamimusubi|en|Kamimusubi|qid=Q3275901|lt=Divine Soul Deity|1=Kamimusubi}}{{Sfn|Ota|1934|p=27|qq=}} |Origin = |Clan Ancestor = |Type = {{ill|Shinbetsu|Shinbetsu|Shinbetsu|ja|神別|1=Shinbetsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbetsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbetsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbetsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbetsu|qq=}} ({{ill|Amatsu-Kunitsukami|Amatsu-Kunitsukami|Amatsu-Kunitsukami|ja|天津神・国津神|1=Kami#Amatsukami_and_Kunitsukami|2=ja|3=天津神・国津神|4=zh|5=天津神與國津神|6=ko|7=아마쓰카미·구니쓰카미|lt=Amatsukami and Kunitsukami|lt=Heavenly Deity|lt_ja=天神|lt_de=Himmelsgott|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsu-Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsu-Kunitsukami|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}) |Main Base = |Figures = {{ill|Ken Inukai Otomo|Ken Inukai Otomo|Ken Inukai Otomo|ja|県犬養大伴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken Inukai Otomo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken Inukai Otomo|1=Ken Inukai Otomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11582686}}
{{ill|Ken Inukai Tegoro|Ken Inukai Tegoro|Ken Inukai Tegoro|ja|県犬養手強|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken Inukai Tegoro|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken Inukai Tegoro|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500723}}
{{ill|Ken Inukai Hirotōji|Ken Inukai Hirotōji|Ken Inukai Hirotōji|ja|県犬養広刀自|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken Inukai Hirotōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken Inukai Hirotōji|1=Agatainukai no Hirotoji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11582687}}
{{ill|Agata no Inukai no Michiyo|en|Agata no Inukai no Michiyo|qid=Q11582685|lt=Sanchiyo|1=Agata no Inukai no Michiyo}}
{{ill|Ken Inukai Anejo|Ken Inukai Anejo|Ken Inukai Anejo|ja|県犬養姉女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken Inukai Anejo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken Inukai Anejo|1=Ken Inukai Anejo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q24873710}} |Descendants = }} {{Nihongo|'''Agata no Inukai clan'''|県犬養氏}} was a {{ill|Shinabe clans|en|Shinabe clans|qid=Q11418456|lt=Shinabe clan|1=Shinabe clans}} tasked with guarding the {{ill|Miyamon|Miyamon|Miyamon|ja|宮門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135500726|1=kyūmon}} and the directly administered estates such as {{ill|Tonsō|Tonsō|Tonsō|ja|屯倉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tonsō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tonsō|1=Miyake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11465761}} of the {{ill|Yamato Court|Yamato Court|Yamato Court|ja|大和朝廷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Court|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Court|ja_comment=|2=ja|3=ヤマト王権|1=Yamato Kingship|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q2658252}}. The Agata Inukai Clan, together with '''{{ill|Waka Inukai Clan|Waka Inukai Clan|Waka Inukai Clan|ja|若犬養氏|lt=Waka Inukai|lt_ja=稚犬養|lt_de=Junger Inukai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Waka Inukai Clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Waka Inukai Clan|1=Waka Inukai Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q55533707}}''', '''{{ill|Adon Inukai Clan|Adon Inukai Clan|Adon Inukai Clan|ja|阿曇犬養氏|lt=Adon Inukai|lt_ja=阿曇犬養|lt_de=Adon Inukai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adon Inukai Clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adon Inukai Clan|1=Adon Inukai Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q65291952}}''', '''{{ill|Kai Inukai Clan|Kai Inukai Clan|Kai Inukai Clan|ja|海犬養氏|lt=Kai Inukai|lt_ja=海犬養|lt_de=Kai Inukai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Inukai Clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kai Inukai Clan|1=Ama-no-Inukai clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata}}''', '''{{ill|Kara Inukai Ren|Kara Inukai Ren|Kara Inukai Ren|ja|辛犬養連|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kara Inukai Ren|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kara Inukai Ren|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}''', and '''{{ill|Adamo-te Inukai|Adamo-te Inukai|Adamo-te Inukai|ja|阿多御手犬養|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adamo-te Inukai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adamo-te Inukai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135500730|1=Ata-no-Mite-Inukai}}''' formed one of the six clans led by {{ill|Tomonomiyatsuko|Banzō|Banzō|ja|伴造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Banzō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11381545|1=Tomonomiyatsuko}}. The term "Agata" is believed to denote lands directly controlled by the court, though this remains uncertainWorld Encyclopedia, 2nd edition, 'Ken Inukai Clan'. == Overview == {{ill|Kamimusubi|en|Kamimusubi|qid=Q3275901|qid=Q3275901|lt=Kamimusubi's|1=Kamimusubi}} descendants, a {{ill|Clan|en|Clan|qid=Q211503|lt=Clan|1=Clan}} of the {{ill|Shinbetsu|Shinbetsu|Shinbetsu|ja|神別|1=Shinbetsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbetsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbetsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbetsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinbetsu|qq=}}, originally bore the surname {{ill|Muraji|en|Muraji|qid=Q2735611|lt=Muraji|1=Muraji}}. However, during the Jinshin War in {{ill|672|en|672|qid=Q30601|lt=672 AD|1=672}} ({{ill|Hakuhō|Hakuhō|Hakuhō|ja|白鳳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakuhō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakuhō|1=Hakuhō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11580612}} first year), the majority of the clan distinguished themselves as {{ill|Retainer|Retainer|Retainer|ja|舎人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Retainer|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Retainer|1=Retainer|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q126081127}} to {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|en|Emperor Tenmu|qid=Q335181|lt=Prince Ōama (future Emperor Tenmu)|1=Emperor Tenmu}}. In {{ill|684|en|684|qid=Q31128|lt=684 AD|1=684}} ({{ill|Hakuhō|Hakuhō|Hakuhō|ja|白鳳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakuhō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakuhō|1=Hakuhō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11580612}} 13th year), with the establishment of the {{ill|Eight-Colored Surname|Eight-Colored Surname|Eight-Colored Surname|ja|八色の姓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight-Colored Surname|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight-Colored Surname|1=Eight Kabane system|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11391729}}, they were granted the {{ill|Sukune|en|Sukune|qid=Q11455653|lt=Sukune|1=Sukune}} surname. In the {{ill|Shinsen Shōjiroku|en|Shinsen Shōjiroku|qid=Q1045362|lt=Shinsen Shōjiroku|1=Shinsen Shōjiroku}}, in the article on Sakyō Divine Agata Inukai Sukune, their genealogy is recorded as "the eighth-generation descendant of {{ill|Kamimusubi|en|Kamimusubi|qid=Q3275901|qid=Q3275901|lt=Kamimusubi|1=Kamimusubi}} and a descendant of Akitato no Mikoto," while in the account by Ōkurai Shiren they are described as "of the same ancestral origin as Agata Inukai." The clan's {{ill|Agata no Inukai no Michiyo|en|Agata no Inukai no Michiyo|qid=Q11582685|lt=Agata no Inukai no Michiyo|1=Agata no Inukai no Michiyo}} served in the courts of five successive reigns—those of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|en|Emperor Tenmu|qid=Q335181|lt=Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}}, {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|qid=Q232026|lt=Jitō|1=Empress Jitō}}, {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|qid=Q357246|lt=Monmu|1=Emperor Monmu}}, {{ill|Empress Genmei|en|Empress Genmei|qid=Q233224|lt=Genmei|1=Empress Genmei}}, and {{ill|Empress Genshō|en|Empress Genshō|qid=Q235343|lt=Genshō|1=Empress Genshō}}—and received the {{ill|Tachibana clan (kuge)|en|Tachibana clan (kuge)|qid=Q1500519|lt=Tachibana clan|1=Tachibana clan (kuge)}} from Emperor Genmei. She, while assisting her husband {{ill|Fujiwara no Fuhito|en|Fujiwara no Fuhito|qid=Q177517|lt=Fujiwara no Fuhito|1=Fujiwara no Fuhito}}, also promoted her clan's prosperity by making {{ill|Ken Inukai Hirotōji|Ken Inukai Hirotōji|Ken Inukai Hirotōji|ja|県犬養広刀自|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken Inukai Hirotōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken Inukai Hirotōji|1=Agatainukai no Hirotoji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11582687}} the consort of {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|qid=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}}. During the era of her son {{ill|Tachibana no Moroe|en|Tachibana no Moroe|qid=Q3135863|lt=Tachibana no Moroe|1=Tachibana no Moroe}}, only one clan member, {{ill|Ken Inukai Ishitsugi|Ken Inukai Ishitsugi|Ken Inukai Ishitsugi|ja|県犬養石次|lt=Ishitsugi|lt_ja=石次|lt_de=Ishitsugi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken Inukai Ishitsugi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken Inukai Ishitsugi|1=Agata Inukai no Ishiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17988277}}, served as a {{ill|Sangi (Japan)|en|Sangi (Japan)|qid=Q1133663|lt=Sangi|1=Sangi (Japan)}}; however, after Morokage lost power, the Agata Inukai Clan eventually declined. == Footnotes == {{Footnote Help|qq=}} {{Notelist|qq=}} {{Reflist|qq=}} == References == * {{Open Access|qq=}}{{Citation|Japanese book|last=Ota|first=Ryo|author-link=Ryo Ota|others={{ill|Ueda Mannen|Ueda Mannen|Ueda Mannen|ja|上田萬年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ueda Mannen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ueda Mannen|1=Ueda Kazutoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11359904}}、{{ill|Mikami Sanji|Mikami Sanji|Mikami Sanji|ja|三上参次|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikami Sanji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikami Sanji|1=Mikami Sanji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11354098}} supervision|chapter=Ken Inukai – Agata|pages=27–28|volume=1|date=1934-04-01|title=Great Dictionary of Surname Genealogies|publisher=Surname Genealogies Publishing Committee|url={{NDLDC|1130845/86|qq=}} National Diet Library Digital Collection|ncid=BN05000207|ref=harv|qq=}} * ‘{{ill|Heibonsha World Encyclopedia|en|Heibonsha World Encyclopedia|qid=Q5698601|lt=World Encyclopedia|1=Heibonsha World Encyclopedia}}’, 2nd edition, "Agata Inukai Clan". {{Full citation needed|date=June 2018|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|県犬養氏|version=100476579|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:県犬養氏]] [[de:Ken Inukai-Clan]] [[ru:Агата-Инукаи]] [[uk:Аґата-Інуакаї]] {{wikidata link|Q11582689}} [[Category:Japanese clans]] [[Category:Uji]] [[Category:県犬養氏]] [[Category:Shinbetsu]] [[Category:Pages with deleted QID in ill template]]
